scripts.dev: node -e "if (process.env.I18NEXUS_API_KEY) { require('child_process').execSync('npx i18nexus pull', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { console.log('I18NEXUS_API_KEY not set; skipping translation sync.'); }" && next dev
scripts.build: node -e "if (process.env.I18NEXUS_API_KEY) { require('child_process').execSync('npx i18nexus pull', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { console.log('I18NEXUS_API_KEY not set; skipping translation sync.'); }" && next build
scripts.start: node -e "if (process.env.I18NEXUS_API_KEY) { require('child_process').execSync('npx i18nexus pull', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { console.log('I18NEXUS_API_KEY not set; skipping translation sync.'); }" && next start
